candidateName: CPU saturation alert: payments-service in us-east-1
summary: CPU saturation alert triggered at 2026-05-26T14:22:00Z. CPU hit 92% sustained for 8 minutes on the payments service in us-east-1. Auto-scale kicked in and brought CPU back to 78%. No customer-visible errors.
notes: Severity-high, requires manual review per incident-response SLA. The payments service is a critical-path dependency for all checkout flows. P99 latency stayed under 300ms throughout.
